# task-status

Single source of truth for `TaskStatus` display metadata. All plugins that render a task's status — as an icon, a colored badge, or a graph node — import from here instead of defining their own color/label maps.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Single source of truth for TaskStatus display metadata — icon, label, icon color, and badge style.
- Web:
  - Uses:
    - `primitives/css/badge.Badge`
    - `primitives/css/center.Center`
    - `primitives/css/inline.Inline`
    - `primitives/css/status-dot.StatusDot`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports (values):
    - `STATUS_META`
    - `StatusBadge`
    - `StatusIcon`
    - `StatusSignal`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by:
    - `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call/add-task`
    - `tasks/task-deps-tree`
    - `tasks/task-graph`
    - `tasks/task-header`
    - `tasks/task-list`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
